text:
Market today: The mood is mixed for tech. While Samsung posted huge profits, investor concerns about AI spending are weighing on the sector. Geopolitical tensions are also heating up with oil price rises.

Your holdings: SOXL (-23.52%) is a major concern, being a leveraged ETF deep in drawdown and below its stop. SPAL (-11.17%) is also a leveraged new position down significantly. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep a close eye on any further news regarding AI spending trends and the broader sentiment around chip names.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your leveraged positions and respecting your stops to protect capital.
plays: SOXL: Exit this leveraged position. It's a SELL, down -23.52%, and below its 200 stop. Protect capital.
SPAL: Monitor closely. It's a new, leveraged position down -11.17%. Respect its 21.38 stop if it triggers to limit downside.
No new buys today - hold and watch.
